name: Penne Pasta W/Tomatoes & Chile
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sun-dried tomatoes, cut into slivers
1 cup Black olives, cured in oil, pitted and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except the cheese and pasta, in a large bowl.
2. Let sit at room temperature for a couple of hours to blend the flavors.
3. Cook the penne pasta in 4 quarts of boiling salted water until tender but still firm - 'al dente'.
4. Drain the pasta.
5. Toss the cooked pasta with the sauce and cheese until well coated.
6. Serve immediately.
